channel.title: Vim on Max Scheijen
channel.description: Recent content in Vim on Max Scheijen

item.title: Find and Replace in Vim
item.description: One of my goals for the remaining part of 2024 is to learn and get comfortable with vim. Both with motions and the editor (NeoVim). I started to work with vim about 2 weeks ago and there is so much to learn. However, I think I have some of the basics covered. One thing I wanted to learn this week is find and replace. This is an operation I use a lot, both in my coding work as in my writing.
